evidence_summary: Wired QueueAIService as the default base AIServicePort in apps/api container. New adapter (apps/api/src/services/queue/QueueAIService.ts) enqueues 'score-lead' jobs to the BullMQ ai-scoring queue, awaits worker result via QueueEvents.waitUntilFinished (60s ceiling), schema-validates result via inline ScoringJobResultMirror, and returns Result.fail(PersistenceError) on every error path (Redis-down, schema mismatch, timeout, job-failed, confidence-out-of-range). GuardrailsAIService decorator preserved unchanged. AIServicePort hexagonal contract preserved. Audit-fix iteration on 2026-04-27 closed 5 reviewer findings: HIGH-1 extended AIServicePort.scoreLead with optional opts: { tenantId?, leadId? } so LeadService threads through real lead.tenantId and lead.id.value (eliminates 'default' literal regression that broke per-tenant feature flags + LeadAIInsight FK upserts); HIGH-2 extended scoring.job.contract.test.ts with ScoringJobResultSchema round-trip + mirror-key check (closes the false-drift-defense claim); MED-3 reverted three production-only KPIs (enqueue_success_rate / scoring_completion_sla_p95 / queue_failure_rate) from met:true to met:false with explanatory notes — only test_coverage stays met:true (96.72% statements / 92.15% branches / 88.88% functions / 98.27% lines on src/services/queue/**); MED-4 corrected AC-009 + NF-006 wording — IFC-125 audit fires on security events only, NOT every successful call (matches GuardrailsAIService.audit.test.ts 20/20 contract); LOW-5 added barrel-import smoke test (case 18) + container-source assertion (smoke describe block) verifying QueueAIService is the default branch when AI_PROVIDER is unset.

dependencies_verified.claim_verified: GuardrailsAIService wraps base AI service in container; audit fires on security events only (AI_CHAIN_FAILURE / AI_PII_EXPOSURE_BLOCKED / AI_BIAS_THRESHOLD_EXCEEDED) per GuardrailsAIService.audit.test.ts 20/20
AI worker consumes 'ai-scoring' queue jobs via processScoringJob at apps/ai-worker/src/jobs/scoring.job.ts:450

definition_of_done_items.item: API container resolves QueueAIService for lead scoring requests
definition_of_done_items.evidence: apps/api/src/container.ts default branch (no AI_PROVIDER, non-test) constructs `new QueueAIService({...})` as baseAIService; verified by smoke test src/services/queue/__tests__/QueueAIService.test.ts case 18 + container.ts source assertion

definition_of_done_items.item: GuardrailsAIService remains decorator over queue-backed provider
definition_of_done_items.evidence: container.ts decorator wrap pattern unchanged; GuardrailsAIService.scoreLead now also forwards opts (tenantId/leadId) to inner service

definition_of_done_items.item: Lead scoring jobs enqueued with correlation metadata and consumed by ai-scoring worker contract
definition_of_done_items.evidence: QueueAIService.scoreLead emits {leadId, tenantId, lead, correlationId, _otelCarrier} matching ScoringJobDataSchema; verified by Step 1.4 contract test (4/4 PASS — including HIGH-2 result-schema regression)

definition_of_done_items.item: Retry and failure handling follow BullMQ defaults
definition_of_done_items.evidence: Queue config NOT modified — inherits AI_SCORING queue defaults from packages/platform/src/queues/types.ts:184-202

LeadService.scoreLead now passes { tenantId: lead.tenantId, leadId: lead.id.value } to aiService.scoreLead; QueueAIService threads through to payload; LeadService.queue-ai.test.ts case 7 [HIGH-1 regression] asserts payload.tenantId !== 'default' AND === seeded tenantId

gate_results.log_path: apps/api/src/container.ts (QueueAIService imported + wired as default base; src/services/queue/__tests__/QueueAIService.test.ts case 18 + smoke describe block exercise the wiring)

kpi_results.actual: not_measured_in_ci (production via BullMQ queue-counts metric: completed/(completed+failed) — see FOLLOWUP-IFC-212-PROD-KPIS)
ceiling_60s_configured_via_resultTimeoutMs; p95 NOT measured in CI (production SLA enforced by worker-side fallback at scoring.job.ts:201-235 — see FOLLOWUP-IFC-212-PROD-KPIS)

not_measured_in_ci (negative-path tests cases 5,6,7,8,10 confirm Result.fail without API crash; production failure rate via BullMQ failed-count/total-count over 24h window — see FOLLOWUP-IFC-212-PROD-KPIS)

notes:
IFC-212 exec phase complete with 5 audit findings remediated honestly (2026-04-27 audit-fix iteration):

[HIGH-1 FIXED] tenantId='default' regression — extended AIServicePort.scoreLead/qualifyLead with optional `opts: AIServiceCallOptions { tenantId?, leadId? }` (packages/application/src/ports/external/AIServicePort.ts). LeadService.scoreLead now passes { tenantId: lead.tenantId, leadId: lead.id.value } (packages/application/src/services/LeadService.ts:198-211). GuardrailsAIService forwards opts to innerService (packages/adapters/src/external/GuardrailsAIService.ts:198, 246). QueueAIService prefers opts.tenantId / opts.leadId, falls back to defaults only for system-context calls. New regression test in LeadService.queue-ai.test.ts case 7 asserts payload.tenantId === seeded tenantId (NOT 'default'). The spec's prior 'NO CHANGE: LeadService.ts' stance has been revisited — the change was necessary to preserve multi-tenancy.

[HIGH-2 FIXED] Mirror drift defense was vapor — extended scoring.job.contract.test.ts case 4 with ScoringJobResultSchema round-trip: imports the worker schema, asserts every key the API-side ScoringJobResultMirror reads is accepted by it, and verifies the worker rejects (a) missing score, (b) confidence outside [0,1], (c) score outside [0,100], (d) unknown tier. Future worker-schema tightening now fails this test before reaching production.

[MED-3 FIXED] Three production-only KPIs (enqueue_success_rate, scoring_completion_sla_p95, queue_failure_rate) reverted from met:true → met:false with explanatory notes citing FOLLOWUP-IFC-212-PROD-KPIS. Only test_coverage stays met:true (the only metric measurable in CI).

[MED-4 FIXED] AC-009 + NF-006 wording corrected to match real IFC-125 contract: GuardrailsAIService logs on security events only (AI_CHAIN_FAILURE / AI_PII_EXPOSURE_BLOCKED / AI_BIAS_THRESHOLD_EXCEEDED), NOT every successful call. The exhaustive coverage of those security paths lives at packages/adapters/src/external/__tests__/GuardrailsAIService.audit.test.ts (20/20). The previous claim 'fires once per call' was incorrect.

[LOW-5 FIXED] Container wiring smoke — added case 18 (barrel import surface) + a 'container.ts AI provider branching (smoke)' describe block that asserts container.ts imports QueueAIService AND constructs it in the default branch AND gates LiteLLMAIService behind explicit AI_PROVIDER='litellm'.

[Side-effect] Patched apps/api/src/test/setup.ts with safeMockReset() to handle composite mocks (mockServices.aiMonitoringStore is plain object after bindAiMonitoringStoreToService — pre-existing IFC-214 work).

[Side-effect] Pre-existing untracked file apps/api/src/modules/routing/__tests__/routing-otel-integration.test.ts (from external work, not part of IFC-212) was blocking apps/api typecheck with module-resolution errors on dynamic imports. The fix landed in two stages — first an Edit added .js extensions to the dynamic imports (formatter reverted), then an external editor rewrote the file to use STATIC top-level imports instead, which compile without the .js suffix under this tsconfig. Final state verified: `await import('../routing.…')` patterns no longer present in the file, and `pnpm --filter @intelliflow/api typecheck` exits 0. (Reviewer audit-fix follow-up 2026-04-27: re-grepped per PG-126 lesson before re-issuing GREEN; typecheck confirmed exit 0 from a clean read of the actual file.)

Follow-ups recorded for future tasks: FOLLOWUP-IFC-212-DUAL-PATH (lead.router.ts:507 fire-and-forget bypass — still uses raw queue.add with correct tenantId), FOLLOWUP-IFC-212-PROD-KPIS (production measurement of the three SLA/availability KPIs).
